Container.Name: website-diff
Container.Overview: Intelligent web page comparison tool with Wayback Machine support, visual regression testing, and significance scoring. Compares two URLs and detects meaningful differences with automatic Wayback Machine artifact cleaning. [br][br] Features multi-browser visual comparison, markdown report generation, site-wide crawling, and CI/CD-ready exit codes. [br][br] More info: https://github.com/GeiserX/Website-Diff
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: website diff compare wayback machine visual regression html

Config.Name: Output Directory
Config.Description: Directory to store diff reports and screenshots
